title: cattleya × hybrida
intro: Cattleya × hybrida, also known as the Cattleya hybrid, is a cross-bred orchid species resulting from the interbreeding of different Cattleya species. The Cattleya × hybrida plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of consuming Cattleya × hybrida preparations are said to include antioxidant and antiviral properties, as well as potential treatments for fever and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Cattleya × hybrida, such as infusions and tinctures, are sometimes used in folk medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
